TITLE COMMITMENT
Property: 742 Evergreen Terrace, Springfield, IL 62701

This commitment certifies that title to the subject property is clear of liens, encumbrances, and defects except as noted in Schedule B. The Tide-sealed digital deed is ready for atomic swap upon dual-party confirmation.
